items.title: Marketing Executive
items.description:
Managed all of the company's social media platforms (2 Fanpages, YouTube, TikTok, Zalo OA)

  • Built and developed 2 sports Fanpages to 10K & 15K followers, ~15M monthly views
  • Grew YouTube to ~4K subscribers via short videos (400+ videos, 3.5M+ total views)
  • Created 3-5 short video scripts daily
  • Researched, designed, and wrote content for 2 Fanpages (2-3 posts/ day/ page)

Designed event media assets
Managed 3 seeding collaborators (in-app engagement)
Supported SEO (content distribution & user growth)

items.title: Marketing intern
items.description:
• Manage two Fanpages - Vico Fresh (86K Follower) and Bonali F&B (6,8K Follower): Plan communication strategies, create content, design visuals, and respond to customer messages and interactions;
  • Develop livestream scripts, set up and host livestream to promote and sell FMCG products;
  • Design company websites for APIS and AIG on Haravan;
  • Manage merchandise, set up displays, and take photos before, during, and after trade fairs and exhibitions.

items.title: Content SEO intern
items.description:
• Research keywords using tools such as Ahrefs and Google Trends,...;
  • Create article outlines and write optimized content for SEO;
  • Design article images and thumbnails, review contributor articles and perform on-page SEO.
